title: lastreopsis tripinnata
intro: Lastreopsis tripinnata, also known as the Australian fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastreopsis tripinnata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
